description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian dressed in an aviator-inspired outfit, featuring a fitted buttoned shirt with a high collar, belted at the waist, and tucked into loose, high-waisted trousers. The figure wears tall, buckled boots and fingerless gloves, with visible harness straps crossing the torso and back, suggesting a utilitarian or adventurous theme. Accessories include a pair of goggles worn on the head and a headband, adding to the vintage pilot aesthetic. The face is expressive, with defined features and short, wavy hair styled away from the face. The overall build is athletic, and the clothing is detailed with seams, buckles, and layered textures. The character exudes a sense of readiness and confidence, suitable for dynamic urban or adventurous settings.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian in an aviator-inspired outfit with a buttoned shirt, harness, tall boots, gloves, and goggles, exuding a confident, adventurous look.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the harness straps crossing the back, the fitted waist, and the back of the boots and gloves.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the side of the goggles, the layered clothing, and the side buckles on the boots.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the expressive face, buttoned shirt, harness, gloves, and the overall confident stance.
description_view_3: Right profile view similar to the left, showing the side of the headgear, gloves, and boot details.
attribute_clothing_type: aviator-style shirt with harness, high-waisted trousers, tall buckled boots, fingerless gloves, and headgear with goggles
